nasb.text: Joiada the son of Paseah and Meshullam the son of Besodeiah repaired the Old Gate; they laid its beams and hung its doors with its bolts and its bars.

esv.text: Joiada the son of Paseah and Meshullam the son of Besodeiah repaired the Gate of Yeshanah.  They laid its beams and set its doors, its bolts, and its bars.

cnv.text: 巴西亞的兒子耶何耶大和比所玳的兒子米書蘭修築古門；他們安置橫梁，裝上門扇、門插和門閂。

ccb.text: 巴西亚的儿子耶何耶大和比所玳的儿子米书兰修筑古门，架上横梁，安上门，装上门闩和门锁。
